excerpt: Ukrainian drone founder Yaroslav Azhnyuk went from pet cameras to AI-guided weapons. He and guest host Noah Smith make the case that the West is asleep at the wheel.
summary_hint: Ukrainian drone founder Yaroslav Azhnyuk went from pet cameras to AI-guided weapons. He and guest host Noah Smith make the case that the West is asleep at the wheel.
title: The Next War Is Already Here. The West Isn't Ready. — Yaroslav Azhnyuk, The Fourth Law & Guest Host Noah Smith, Noahpinion
